# Planner — roadmap-per-issue-regenerator

## Recommendation: Option A — Gated Regeneration

### Cross-cutting decisions (apply to all options)

- Per-issue schema: key:value lines parseable by existing field() regex. Required fields: issue, title, status, workflow_project, current_phase, claim_holder, next_step. Optional: `# Issue {N}: {title}` heading.
- Data sourcing: `.roadmap/*.md` is source of truth. gh issue list is enrichment only (status+title override). OFFLINE → file-only.
- Pre-commit hook: add `grep -v '^kaola-workflow/\.roadmap/'`. Non-negotiable.
- Script structure: mirror kaola-workflow-claim.js (shebang, execFileSync, OFFLINE guard, local assert, isSafeName, getRoot, hand-rolled arg parsing, subcommand dispatch, Object.assign immutability, stderr/stdout no console.*).
- Idempotency: deterministic sort by issue number desc, stable newline, write only on byte-diff.
- Out of scope: issue #6 classifier; .locks/.sessions semantics; closed-issue archival; workflow-state.md schema changes; renaming ROADMAP.md.

### Option A — Gated regeneration (committed ROADMAP.md) [RECOMMENDED]

ROADMAP.md stays tracked. Regenerated at exactly two gates:
1. Phase 6 Step 7 (finalize): delete .roadmap/issue-{N}.md, run roadmap.js generate, commit both.
2. workflow-next Startup Step 2: regenerate from .roadmap/ + gh issue list, commit if dirty.

Phases 1–5 never touch ROADMAP.md. Phase 1 creates .roadmap/issue-{N}.md; Phases 4/5/6 update their per-issue file.

- Pros: zero conflict surface Phases 1-5 (disjoint per-issue files); ROADMAP.md remains on GitHub; idempotency check straightforward; smallest deviation from current pattern; pre-commit hook already excludes ROADMAP.md.
- Cons: residual Phase-6 vs Phase-6 race on ROADMAP.md (mitigation: idempotent generator + git rebase retry on generated artifact).
- Complexity: Medium (~250 LOC new script + ~6 file edits)
- Pattern fit: Excellent

### Option B — Per-phase regeneration [REJECTED]

Every phase runs roadmap.js generate after writing per-issue file and commits ROADMAP.md.
- Reintroduces the conflict source this issue exists to eliminate.
- Higher write amplification.
- Rejected: defeats the purpose.

### Option C — Gitignored locally, regenerated on demand [NOT RECOMMENDED]

ROADMAP.md added to .gitignore; regenerated locally only.
- Pros: zero conflict surface.
- Cons: ROADMAP.md disappears from GitHub; UX regression; onboarding friction.
- Not recommended unless public visibility of ROADMAP.md is explicitly not wanted.

### Option A Concrete Plan

1. New script: scripts/kaola-workflow-roadmap.js
   - Subcommands: generate (default), migrate, validate
   - generate: read .roadmap/issue-*.md → optionally enrich gh issue list → render table sorted by issue number desc → write ROADMAP.md only if byte-different
   - migrate: parse current ROADMAP.md table, write .roadmap/issue-{N}.md per row (idempotent, skip if exists)
   - validate: regenerate to temp buffer, diff against existing ROADMAP.md, exit 1 if mismatch (CI/npm test)

2. Per-issue file template:
   ```
   # Issue {N}: {title}
   
   issue: {N}
   title: {title}
   status: {open|closed}
   workflow_project: {folder name or —}
   current_phase: {1-6 or —}
   claim_holder: {session_id or —}
   next_step: {free-text}
   ```

3. ROADMAP.md header: prepend `<!-- generated by scripts/kaola-workflow-roadmap.js — do not edit -->`

4. Phase command updates:
   - phase1.md: create .roadmap/issue-{N}.md at project init
   - phase4.md / phase5.md: update current_phase in per-issue file (no ROADMAP.md touch)
   - phase6.md Step 7: delete .roadmap/issue-{N}.md, run roadmap.js generate
   - workflow-next.md Startup Step 2: run roadmap.js generate
   - workflow-init.md: bootstrap creates .roadmap/ + runs roadmap.js generate

5. Pre-commit hook: add `grep -v '^kaola-workflow/\.roadmap/'`
6. install.sh: add kaola-workflow-roadmap.js to explicit list
7. Tests:
   - validate-workflow-contracts.js: assert roadmap.js in install.sh; assert ROADMAP.md has "do not edit" comment; assert phase6.md references roadmap.js; assert hook has new exclusion
   - simulate-workflow-walkthrough.js: fixture .roadmap/ → run generate → assert table; run twice → assert byte-equal; run validate on stale ROADMAP.md → assert exit 1

### Open Questions

1. current_phase + claim_holder in ROADMAP.md table? Recommendation: NO — keep 5-column schema, per-issue files store extra fields. Preserves existing UX.
2. ROADMAP.md in OFFLINE + empty .roadmap/: generate should produce header-only (empty table body). Spell out in script's generate behavior.
3. workflow-init.md bootstrap needs updating.
